title: alternanthera littoralis var. maritima
intro: Alternanthera littoralis var. maritima, also known as red calophyllum or red mangrove, is a variety of Alternanthera littoralis, a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, Alternanthera littoralis var. maritima is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and it may be used to treat various ailments.
